Prestige Business Centre

West Bay, Doha, Qatar · Tower C, 14th Floor
QAR 22,000/ month· QAR 264,000 annually
450
Sq. Metres
6
Offices
4

14th
Floor
Long
Lease OK
About This Property

Prestige Business Centre offers a premium office environment in the heart of West Bay — Doha's premier commercial district. Spanning 450 sq. metres across the 14th floor of Tower C, this space delivers panoramic city and sea views alongside a fully fitted, professional-grade interior.

The layout includes six private offices, a fully equipped conference room for up to 12 people, an open collaboration area, a reception lobby, and a dedicated server room. Move-in ready with high-speed fibre internet, central air conditioning, and 24-hour security.

Features & Amenities
High-Speed Fibre Internet
Reception & Waiting Area
12-Person Conference Room
4 Reserved Parking Bays
24/7 Security & Access
Panoramic City & Sea Views
Central Air Conditioning
Move-in Ready
Location
West Bay, Doha — Click to open Google Maps
Tower C, 14th Floor, West Bay Business District, Al Corniche Street, Doha, Qatar
Monthly Rent
QAR 22,000
Per calendar month · negotiable for long term

Althujoori Real Estate & Trading Co.
Salwa Road, Doha, Qatar
Common Questions
Frequently Asked Questions
How quickly can I move into a property?
Most available properties are move-in ready immediately upon signing the lease and completing payment. Minor fit-out usually takes 1–2 weeks.
What documents are required to rent?
For commercial: Trade License (CR), company letterhead, authorised signatory Qatar ID. For residential: valid Qatar ID or passport. Our team will guide you through the full process.
Do you offer short-term lease options?
Yes. While most leases are annual, flexible and month-to-month options are available for select units. Contact us directly to discuss your requirements.
Can I schedule a viewing before committing?
Absolutely — we encourage all potential tenants to visit in person. Simply contact us via the form or WhatsApp and we'll arrange a viewing at your convenience.

Home›About Us
Our Story

Built on Trust,
Driven by
Excellence

For over 15 years, Althujoori Real Estate and Trading Co. has been shaping Qatar's property landscape — connecting businesses and families with spaces that inspire success, comfort, and growth.

15+
Years in Qatar
120+
Properties Managed
400+
Satisfied Clients
Althujoori Headquarters
Est. Since 2009
Doha, Qatar
400+
Happy Tenants
Abdul Hadi Al Sulaiman
Chairman & Founder
Chairman's Signature
Abdul Hadi Al Sulaiman
Chairman's Message

A Vision Rooted in
Qatar's Future

"

When I founded Althujoori Real Estate and Trading Co. in 2009, I had a singular vision: to create a company that would not merely facilitate transactions, but build lasting relationships — with our tenants, our community, and the nation we are proud to call home.

Qatar's ambitions are great, and the spaces in which people live and work must reflect that greatness. We do not simply manage properties — we curate environments where businesses thrive and families flourish.

Over 15 years, we have grown from a small office in Doha to a portfolio spanning over 120 properties across the country. Through every phase of Qatar's extraordinary development — from the National Vision 2030 to the landmark achievements our nation has delivered on the world stage — Althujoori has been a steadfast part of that journey.

Our success is not measured in numbers alone. It is measured in the businesses that launched from our commercial spaces, the families that built their lives in our villas, and the long-term relationships we have cultivated over years of honest and transparent service. We are honoured by the trust our clients place in us, and we take that responsibility seriously every single day.

Looking ahead, we remain committed to expanding our portfolio with the same standard of quality and integrity that has defined us since day one. Whether you are a growing business seeking your ideal headquarters, or a family looking for a place to call home, Althujoori is here — not just as a landlord, but as a partner in your journey.

On behalf of our entire team, I welcome you to Althujoori, and I look forward to serving you.

Abdul Hadi Al Sulaiman
Chairman & Founder — Althujoori Real Estate & Trading Co.
Our Journey

15 Years of Building
Qatar's Property Landscape

From a single office to a portfolio spanning the nation — every step of our journey has been guided by one principle: putting our clients first.

2009
Company Founded
Althujoori Real Estate & Trading Co. was established in Doha with a focus on commercial leasing and a commitment to transparency.
2012
Residential Expansion
Expanded into villa and residential accommodation leasing across Al Rayyan and West Bay, growing the portfolio to 30+ properties.
2016
Industrial & Warehouse Division
Launched dedicated warehouse and industrial space offerings, serving Qatar's growing logistics and manufacturing sectors.
2020
100 Properties Milestone
Reached 100 properties under management across 7 districts in Qatar — a testament to the trust placed in us by our clients and partners.
2024
Digital Transformation
Launched a full digital platform to better serve clients with real-time property listings, online inquiries, and streamlined tenancy management.
Our Portfolio
120+
Properties Managed
What We Stand For

Our Mission, Vision & Values

Everything we do is guided by a clear purpose — to be the most trusted real estate partner in Qatar.

Mission
To Deliver Premium Spaces with Purpose
To provide businesses and families across Qatar with premium, well-managed properties — delivered with transparency, care, and an unwavering commitment to long-term relationships.
Vision
To Be Qatar's Most Trusted Real Estate Partner
To be recognised across Qatar as the most trusted, client-centred real estate company — a partner that clients return to not because they must, but because they choose to.
Core Values
The Principles That Guide Everything We Do
Integrity in every transaction
Quality held to the highest standard
Partnership over transactional thinking
Excellence in service and after-care
Respect for every client, every time
What We Offer

Our Complete Property Portfolio

From premium corporate offices to spacious family villas — we manage a diverse range of properties across Qatar's most sought-after districts.

24
Office Spaces
Premium corporate offices in West Bay, Lusail, and The Pearl — fully fitted and move-in ready.
32
Accommodation Villas
Spacious private villas across Al Rayyan, West Bay, and Lusail for families and executives.
18
Commercial Units
Versatile commercial spaces for retail, hospitality, and light industrial operations.
41
Other Rentals
Warehouses, storage depots, land plots, and mixed-use spaces throughout Qatar.
Why Althujoori

What Sets Us Apart

In a market full of options, here is why hundreds of businesses and families consistently choose Althujoori.

01
15+ Years of Local Expertise
We know Qatar's property market inside out. Our team has navigated every phase of the country's growth and understands what clients truly need — not just what they ask for.
02
Transparent, Honest Dealings
No hidden fees. No surprises. Every lease agreement, every price, and every term is communicated clearly and honestly from the very first conversation.
03
Dedicated After-Rental Support
Our relationship doesn't end when you sign the lease. Our dedicated support team is on hand throughout your tenancy to ensure your space always performs at its best.
04
Diverse, Premium Portfolio
From boutique offices to large-scale warehouses and luxury villas — we have the breadth to serve businesses of every size and families of every profile.
05
Fast, Responsive Team
We respond to every inquiry within 24 hours. Viewings arranged within 48 hours. We understand that time matters — especially when you need a space quickly.
06
Long-Term Partnerships
Over 70% of our tenants renew their lease with us. A number built on trust, reliability, and a genuine desire to see our clients succeed.
Recognition
